microsoft_ft: Owned Azure's **recovery validation program** end-to-end, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized compliance-tracking system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, reducing **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — enabling the team to scale compliance coverage without proportional headcount growth.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by running user demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating developer velocity.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort per region**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate toil — mirroring an automation-first approach to validating product compliance.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact remediation — establishing a cross-team compliance visibility model.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives in a fast-paced environment, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process under tight delivery timelines.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention risk across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, building the organizational discipline to track compliance across a high-volume operational pipeline.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile across key geographic markets.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver actionable pricing recommendations to leadership, demonstrating data-driven prioritization under ambiguous conditions.
